//: Lighthouse CI budget gate (K.W2 CI/CD lane — closes the W8 M5.2 zero-instrumented-runs gap). HARD since S.W0 W0-2(b). Core Web Vitals floor per UNIFIED-CICD §1 stage 6: CLS ≤ 0.1, LCP ≤ 2.5s, INP ≤ 200ms, TBT ≤ 300ms. staticDistDir is CWD-relative (NOT config-file-relative): the treosh `uses:` step runs at the WORKSPACE root of the nested-workspace CI layout (R.W7 X3 — value.js checked out at path: value.js), so the built artifact is under value.js/dist/gh-pages from LHCI's CWD.
